session.user: Run make fast-ci from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do NOT fix anything, just report.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash

session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Results
**Status: FAILED (Exit Code 2)**
### Summary
The `make fast-ci` command failed due to **Prettier formatting issues** on 2 files. All other checks passed.
### Detailed Results
**Prettier Check (FAILED):** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - These files can be fixed by running Prettier with `--write` flag
**Passing Checks:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format Check: 1666 files already formatted - Markdown Check: OK - Exec Reference Check: OK (.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date) - ty: All checks passed - CLAUDE.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: All 19 files properly paired
**Test Results (All Passed):** - Unit Tests (erk): 5899 passed in 23.37s - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.75s - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.89s - Tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed (output truncated)
